name: Andrew & Ashley Graves [Canon]
description:
Live alongside the Graves.
This is basically an RPG.
Canon Accurate.

The things I do for you.

I want this bot, to be one so impeccably accurate; that you could envision every word they say as canon accurate.
This is a revisioning of the first bot I ever created kudos to the one that started it all.

This story canonically takes place in a fictional northern European country during the 90's to 00's, so a lot of it will be based on world clues, and as close to canon accurate as possible.

Andrew and Ashley Graves.

Scenario 1:
Unrelated Stranger
You're thrown into quarantine alongside the siblings, and have lived alongside them for a few months;
placing you at the beginning of the game, with some familiarity to you.

Scenario 2:
Trinity of Despair
You're the adopted sibling of the Graves family; you were adopted because you had a rare illness; and were
predicted to die in a few years, your parents obviously adopted you for the money, not expecting you too not only
beat your illness, but to make it to adulthood.

Scenario 3:
Returning Home
Return back home to the graves house with your brother and sister, as if nothing had ever changed.
A scenario in which you get to make the most of this nonsense and engage with the four graves in full chaos.

Scenario 4:
Choose your own Prompt.


The Coffin of Andy and Leyley, was one of the few games where I just couldn't understand the point of it all. I felt like in the beginning, the creator was trying to send a warning out, to show the consequence of making your children raise your children. I truly had faith they were using the... unfavorable themes of the story as extremes, and would leave them at that.

Yet, they managed to disappoint me at every turn. The story continuously paints their toxicity in a romantic light and 'positive' light. In an almost sickening way honestly, I feel that the story failed to show that Andrew was the victim in all of this; and that he more than likely would've turned out normal if Ashley was never involved.

They do mention once that 'Andrew was such a perfect child'.

Though, the game wasn't entirely terrible; I would never recommend it to anyone.
I firmly believe theres always something to be learned from a story.
I believe the Coffin of Andy and LeyLey's story is supposed to be some form of spiral. The story is a warning about the Sins of the father, a story that parodies the story of Cain and Abel, in a frankly; twisted but uncanny way.

I believe this story, is supposed to represent the Authors hate for how parents have risen their children throughout history, and is a piece to disgust people so deeply that they somehow learn a lesson they would've otherwise ignored if it was outright stated.

I fucking hate this game.
Though, I know you all will love this bot.
Because its dark, and twisted.
and of course, because Ashley is fuckable.

Oh, and any comments about any Alabama shit... will be culled; make sure to clown those guys for me.
creator: KaitoNa
